validator_3_dev_datatables_live_status.details: Three DEV tables were found in project mNx2JLqnsOgn6t6X with the archived schemas. Row counts are evidenced in dev_datatables_meta.json: products=242, customers=1, invoices=2.

validator_4_dev_isolation.details: No legacy production/Data Table IDs were found in the three exported DEV workflow JSON files.

validator_5_external_nodes_and_secrets_l.details: All classified external nodes in all DEV workflows are disabled. The residual Supabase key found in disabled DEV node search_restaurante_data was redacted live and a second scan found zero raw key/JWT patterns.

validator_6_package_secret_scan.details: No raw sb_, sk-, or JWT patterns were found in the portable 0-etapa evidence package.

validator_7_rollback_evidence.details: rollback_test_evidence.json records an 85-node / 69-connection disposable rollback test and confirmed cleanup.

validator_8_supabase_rag_compatibility.details: public.match_documents exists and returned one result in a controlled probe. hybrid_search also returned one result. Both functions are SECURITY INVOKER with fixed search_path; match_documents execution is service_role-only.

validator_9_checksum_manifest.details: 43 package files were indexed and verified with SHA-256 after all final evidence was written.

residual_advisories.detail: RLS is enabled and has no policies. Current design restricts the RAG access path to service_role; this pre-existing design needs an explicit application-level decision before changing RLS.

Supabase advisor still reports the pre-existing SECURITY DEFINER function executable by anon/authenticated. It is outside the RAG functions corrected in this stage and was not changed without a defined owner/use-case.

The n8n connector reports an old audio-resource schema compatibility warning. The node is disabled, the workflow is inactive with zero triggers, and it was preserved to keep the backup topology intact.
